field.name: tw_invoice_track
field.invisible: tw_blr_skip_export or tw_blr_format_code in ['28','29'] or (tw_blr_format_code in ['25','35'] and tw_utility_carrier_no) or (tw_blr_format_code in ['22','24','27','32','34','36'] and tw_other_voucher_no)
field.required: not tw_blr_skip_export and ((tw_blr_format_code in ['21','23','26','31','33']) or (tw_blr_format_code in ['25','35'] and not tw_utility_carrier_no) or (tw_blr_format_code in ['22','24','27','32','34','36'] and not tw_other_voucher_no))

field.name: tw_invoice_number
field.invisible: tw_blr_skip_export or tw_blr_format_code in ['28','29'] or (tw_blr_format_code in ['25','35'] and tw_utility_carrier_no) or (tw_blr_format_code in ['22','24','27','32','34','36'] and tw_other_voucher_no)
field.required: not tw_blr_skip_export and ((tw_blr_format_code in ['21','23','26','31','33']) or (tw_blr_format_code in ['25','35'] and not tw_utility_carrier_no) or (tw_blr_format_code in ['22','24','27','32','34','36'] and not tw_other_voucher_no))

field.name: tw_other_voucher_no
field.invisible: tw_blr_skip_export or tw_blr_format_code not in ['22','24','27','32','34','36'] or tw_invoice_track or tw_invoice_number

field.name: tw_utility_carrier_no
field.invisible: tw_blr_skip_export or tw_blr_format_code not in ['25','35'] or tw_invoice_track or tw_invoice_number
